# MEMORIES.md
# SkillOpt — Structured Optimization Log
#
# This file is auto-updated by SkillOpt after each optimization run.
# Format: one JSON block per run, most recent first.
# Do not edit entries manually — append only.

## Purpose

This file serves as the canonical training history for all skills optimized
by SkillOpt. Each entry records:

- Which skill was optimized and when
- The baseline and final scores
- How many rewrites were accepted vs rejected
- The total API cost of the run
- A per-iteration log of what changed

Agents can query this file to understand *why* instructions are written the
way they are — providing an audit trail for optimization decisions.
